title: Dabur India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Dabur India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Dabur India has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Dabur India:
Dabur India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dabur India!
